issues.bib_says: Pi, Yuxuan and Yang, Diyi and Nguyen, Dong
issues.correct_value: Pi, Xinyu and Yang, Qisen and Nguyen, Chuong (per arXiv 2509.24294, NASA ADS, OpenReview ZJn0TMTy8C, Semantic Scholar). Diyi Yang and Dong Nguyen are NOT authors of this paper.

issues.bib_says: Proceedings of the 2025 Conference on Empirical Methods in Natural Language Processing (EMNLP)
issues.correct_value: Not verifiable as an EMNLP 2025 paper. The paper does not appear in the EMNLP 2025 accepted main papers list, and Xinyu Pi's ACL Anthology page lists no LOGOS paper. OpenReview lists it as 'Submitted to ICLR 2026'. Safest fix: cite as an arXiv preprint (@misc with eprint=2509.24294) until a peer-reviewed venue is confirmed.
